hero.title:
We build the web
your business deserves.
hero.sub: Troiana is a web development agency crafting fast, beautiful, conversion-focused websites and web applications — designed and engineered end to end.

services.title: Website Design & Build
services.desc: Marketing sites, landing pages and brand sites that load instantly and convert.

services.title: Web Applications
services.desc: Dashboards, portals and SaaS products on modern, scalable stacks.

services.title: E-Commerce
services.desc: Storefronts and checkout flows engineered to maximise revenue.

services.title: UI / UX Design
services.desc: Interfaces that feel effortless — research-led design systems.

services.title: Performance & SEO
services.desc: Core Web Vitals, technical SEO and rock-solid hosting so you rank and stay fast.

services.title: Maintenance & Support
services.desc: Ongoing care, updates and feature work — your long-term tech partner.

services.title: Web3 & On-Chain
services.desc: Wallet-based apps, on-chain analytics and crypto community platforms.

projects.title: Zolea
projects.desc: A community platform with live coin cards, real-time chat, voice and in-app Solana trading.

projects.title: web.zolea.fun
projects.desc: The Zolea web app — Discord-style crypto communities with real-time chat, voice, presence and wallet-based login.

projects.title: apps.zolea.fun
projects.desc: The Zolea on-chain toolkit — a hub of standalone Solana apps for token security, holder analysis and wallet checks.

projects.title: Pump.fun Rug Checker
projects.desc: Paste a wallet and see every pump.fun coin it launched — dead vs graduated, with a 0–100 rug-rate reputation score.

projects.title: Security Scanner
projects.desc: Mint & freeze authority, holder concentration, liquidity and age distilled into an instant 0–100 security score.

projects.title: Holder Analysis
projects.desc: Top 10/25/50 holders, concentration roll-ups, whale dominance and distribution charts — straight from the chain.

projects.title: Wallet Checker
projects.desc: Inspect any Solana wallet — SOL & token balances, wallet age, transaction count and recent activity with an allocation chart.

projects.title: Bubble Map
projects.desc: An interactive graph of the creator, top holders and connected wallets — with transfer tracing and cluster highlighting.

projects.title: Developer Tracker
projects.desc: Track a token's creator — current holdings, transfers and sells, a developer risk score and a full activity timeline.

projects.title: PrintHouse
projects.desc: Printing, signage and promotional company site with an online product catalogue.

projects.title: Elshani Garten
projects.desc: Garden & landscape construction in Gilching — terraces, paving, decks and outdoor design.

projects.title: Gashi Garten & Tiefbau
projects.desc: A reliable partner for garden and outdoor works — GaLaBau, maintenance and groundworks.

projects.title: Catering Prishtina
projects.desc: An elegant catering & events brand in Prishtina — menus, occasions and online enquiries.

projects.title: SHSRK
projects.desc: The Dental Association of Kosovo — institutional site with congress & abstract submissions.
